services.name: Facial Treatments
services.desc: Customized facials using clean, skin-loving formulas to brighten, hydrate, and restore your natural glow. Suitable for all skin types.

services.name: Massage Therapy
services.desc: Swedish, deep tissue, and aromatherapy massage by certified therapists. Release tension and step back into ease.

services.name: Hair Care
services.desc: Expert cuts, color, and treatments tailored to your texture and lifestyle. We work with all hair types with equal expertise.

services.name: Nail Services
services.desc: Manicures, pedicures, gel, and nail art. Hygienic, precise, and always on-trend — or classically timeless, your call.

services.name: Body Treatments
services.desc: Exfoliating scrubs, wraps, and hydrating body rituals to nourish skin head to toe. A full reset for your body and mind.

services.name: Spa Packages
services.desc: Curated wellness journeys combining multiple treatments at a relaxed pace. Perfect for a gift, a celebration, or simply yourself.
